title: ospsuite (development version)
text: loadDataSetsFromExcel() now accepts sheets parameter specify sheets load. sheets = NULL (default), function uses sheets defined importer configuration. configuration sheets defined, sheets loaded. sheets character vector, specific sheets loaded, overriding sheets configuration. importAllSheets parameter now deprecated removed version 14. toDisplayUnit() now accepts optional unit parameter specify source unit values, consistent toUnit() toBaseUnit() functions. specified, values assumed base unit (maintaining backward compatibility). (#1755) addOutputs() setOutputs() now throw error default provided path found. behavior can disabled setting stopIfNotFound = FALSE. ospUnits$Dimensionless$Unitless ospUnits$Fraction$Unitless now return empty string "" instead literal string "Unitless". Added read-valueOrigin property Quantity class (including Parameter derived classes) access value origin underlying .NET object. useful generating automated reports track parameter value provenance. createImporterConfigurationForFile() now automatically sets sheets attribute sheet parameter provided, eliminating need manually set using loadDataSetsFromExcel(). Fixed getSteadyState() correctly apply lowerThreshold positive negative values. threshold now filters values interval [-lowerThreshold, lowerThreshold] instead values threshold. (#1348) exportResultsToCSV() now validates input single SimulationResults object rejects lists results, preventing downstream .NET interop failures. (#1249)

title: ospsuite 12.4.1
text: R version >=4.4 required ospsuite.utils version >=1.10.0 required package longer re-exports %||%. ospsuite::%||% work.

title: ospsuite 12.4.1
text: Computational core libraries updated match OSPS Version 12 update 2 release.

title: ospsuite 12.4.1
text: Using native operator %||% instead importing ospsuite.utils package.

title: ospsuite 12.4.0
text: Added support macOS (Intel Apple Silicon architectures). (#1621)

title: ospsuite 12.4.0
text: Added optional names parameter dataSetToTibble() function support custom naming datasets. particularly useful multiple datasets original name. naming logic moved private .dataSetToDataFrame() method DataCombined dataSetToTibble() better code reuse maintainability. (#1627)

title: ospsuite 12.3.2
text: OSPSuite binaries updated match OSPSuite v12.1 release.

title: ospsuite 12.3.1
text: Fixed tests expectations better compatibility latest version ospsuite.utils package. (#1570) Revised ŌĆ£get startedŌĆØ (https://www.open-systems-pharmacology.org/OSPSuite-R/articles/ospsuite.html) documentation page make accesible new users. (#1571)

title: ospsuite 12.3.0
text: ┬┤{ospsuite}now requires{ospsuite.utils}` version >= 1.7.0. Classes SimulationBatchRunValues SimulationBatchOptions exported . used directly.

title: ospsuite 12.3.0
text: DataImporterConfiguration now supports getting setting Lower Limit Quantification (LLOQ) column name via new field lloqColumn. column name set (value NULL), LLOQ values imported measurement column values written form ŌĆś< xxxŌĆÖ (e.g., ŌĆś<0.001ŌĆÖ). Otherwise, values imported specified column (#722)

title: ospsuite 12.3.0
text: Added showLegendPerDataset parameter plotIndividualTimeProfile() plotPupulationTimeProfile() optionally display separate legend entries dataset. experimental. Improved print outputs classes Classes inherit deprecated Printable class ospsuite.utils package. Print methods classes now implemented using ospPrint\* functions introduced version 1.6.2. ospsuite.utils package. ParameterRange$printValue() deprecated. Use getPrintValue() conjunction print method choice. Private method Quantity$printQuantity() removed. Quantity$printValue() Quantity$printQuantityValue() deprecated. Use getPrintValue() conjunction print method choice. SnapshotParameter$printValue() deprecated. Use getPrintValue() conjunction print method choice. Added snapshot tests print methods. calculateResiduals() DataCombined now supports full pairwise residual computation multiple observed simulated datasets within group. name property Simulation can now changed (#1245) calculateResiduals now handles single-point simulated datasets via direct x-value matching instead interpolation. Unmatched observed x-values return NA (#1559).

title: ospsuite 12.2.0
text: New runSimulationsFromSnapshot() run simulations .json snapshots files, New convertSnapshot() convert project snapshots .json .pksim5 files. New getMolWeightFor() retrieve molecular weight molecule Quantity.

title: ospsuite 12.1.0
text: package fully supports Linux. package loses dependency {rClr} gains rSharp. package require local installation PK-Sim . required dependencies shipped package.

title: ospsuite 12.0.0
text: single argument getBaseUnit() function now named quantityOrDimension (dimension previously). can now use objects class Quantity inputs, consistent toBaseUnit() function.

title: ospsuite 12.0.0
text: package gains openxlsx {lifecyle} dependencies. Added function getSteadyState() calculate steady state values simulations. function particular use models endogenous substrates, changing parameter value (e.g., production rate) change steady-state values substrate. steady-state considered last values molecules amounts state variable parameters simulation sufficiently long simulation time, .e., rates processes (significantly) change. steady-state analytically calculated estimated way simulating given time. Added function exportSteadyStateToXLS() export steady state values calculated one simulation using getSteadyState() Excel file can imported MoBi. Lower limit quantification (LLOQ) plotted dotted lines plotIndividualTimeProfile() plotPopulationTimeProfile(). plotPopulationTimeProfile() provides two new aggregations methods: arithmetic geometric average ability chose number standard deviations display around mean nsd argument. Function calculateResiduals() uses natural logarithm (log()) calculating residuals scaling = "log" opposed log10() done . also affects figures created plotObservedVsSimulated(), plotResidualsVsSimulated(), plotResidualsVsTime(). (#1091, #1087). plotPopulationTimeProfile() new aggregation argument allow user choose quantiles, arithmetic geometric aggregations y.

title: ospsuite 12.0.0
text: Named Simulation lists can passed runSimulations() results returned named list using names instead simulation id. name provided, simulation id used . (#1383) order columns data frame returned DataCombined$toDataFrame() changed. DataCombined$toDataFrame() shows data order data sets added alphabetically sorted. DataCombined$removeGroupAssignment() show warning specified name present DataCombined. DataCombined$removeGroupAssignment() produce error specified names unique. Fixed Passing font size options plotConfiguration objects tlf objects (#1198) Legend now transparent background default can customized new DefaultPlotConfiguration fields (#1216) plotObsVsPred() now foldDistance argument set NULL default (previously 2). function add fold lines plot default display identity line. Set argument FALSE draw lines. DefaultPlotConfiguration new setting: displayLLOQ (default TRUE) control plotting LLOQ lines. DefaultPlotConfigurationŌĆÖs xLimits yLimits arguments deprecated replaced xAxisLimits yAxisLimits. Use zoom plot preserving data points. Use xValuesLimits yValuesLimits filter data point outside range. detailed explanations . addSimulationResults addDataSets methods DataCombined class now support optional silent argument silences checks data set names. expect replace data sets DataCombined objects repeatedly, consider switching parameter default FALSE value TRUE. simulationResultsToDataFrame() faster (#1317, @Felixmil). DataCombined gets new method setDataTypes() change data types (observed simulated) existing data sets. method useful want enforce certain data type, e.g., adding artificial data set simulated results. New function setOutputs() change outputs SimulationBatch objects. combines clearOutputs() setOutputs() one function. New simulations life cycle flowcharts vignette("efficient-calculations") vignette. New internal function .setEndSimulationTime() set end time simulation. function either extend shorten simulation time specified end time. Using runSimulation() now soft deprecated favor runSimulations().

title: ospsuite 11.1.197
text: Adds new visualization functions: plotObservedVsSimulated() observed versus simulated data scatter plot. plotResidualsVsTime() time versus residuals data scatter plot. plotResidualsVsSimulated() simulated versus residuals data scatter plot. Adds new helper functions work DataCombined objects: convertUnits() convert datasets DataCombined common units. calculateResiduals() calculate residuals datasets DataCombined. class SimulationBatch gets new property id. output runSimulationBatches() now named list names ids SimulationBatch. calculateResiduals() now uses log(base = 10) calculation residuals logarithmic scale instead log(base = exp(1)) calculateResiduals() also return residuals entries simulated observed value 0 logarithmic scale. values ignored previous versions. observed simulated value zero negative, replaced arbitrary small value getOSPSuiteSetting("LOG_SAFE_EPSILON") (1e-20 default).

title: ospsuite 11.1.197
text: SimulationBatch$addRunValues() throw error start value NaN. SimulatioBatch gets methods getVariableParameters() getVariableMolecules() return list parameter resp. molecule paths defined variable.

title: ospsuite 11.0.123
text: Signature toUnit function changed. molWeight now fifth, sourceUnit fourth parameter (#837). DataImporterConfiguration: fields timeUnitFromColumn measurementUnitFromColumn renamed isTimeUnitFromColumn isMeasurementUnitFromColumn constructor DataImporterConfiguration accept path configuration file . Use function loadDataImporterConfiguration() create configuration object file. constructor DataSet objects requires name argument. validate*() helper functions "%||%" infix operators longer exported. Please look new utility package, functions now exported: https://www.open-systems-pharmacology.org/OSPSuite.RUtils/. pkAnalysesAsDataFrame() function changes column data types QuantityPath, Parameter, Unit factor character (#673).

title: ospsuite 11.0.123
text: Adds new DataCombined class combines observed data (DataSet) simulated data (SimulationResults) single object. Especially important $toDataFrame() method object returns data frame containing combined data observed simulated data, can used visualizations analysis. Adds new visualization functions: plotIndividualTimeProfile() plotPopulationTimeProfile() create time-profile plots. Adds new class DefaultPlotConfiguration provide plot configurations plotting functions. Adds simulationResultsToDataFrame() function convert SimulationResults objects data frame. *ToDataFrame() functions also get *ToTibble() variants extract tibble data frame instead classical data frame. Following functions marked deprecation removed future releases: pkAnalysesAsDataFrame() now pkAnalysesToDataFrame() populationAsDataFrame() now populationToDataFrame()

title: ospsuite 10.0
text: Version compatible OSPSuite V10.

title: ospsuite 10.0
text: Enable Batch Simulation Run (#444). Export population CSV (#423). Support aging data population calculation (#295). Enums look units dimensions (#478). Support R4 (#531). extend setParameterValuesByPath function (#541). DataSet: load PKML (#575). Efficient calculations, see vignette.

title: ospsuite 10.0
text: calculate PK-Parameters population one individual simulation failed (#436). Usability issue creating population (#473). Unnecessary Debug output plot tasks (#503). uniqueEntities: Error passing one entity (#515). R-Toolbox bug? getAllParametersMatching(). (#428). Add CL parameter list StandardPKPArameters (#582). toBaseUnit toUnit support null input (return null). (#583). ospsuite::toBaseUnit case insensitive (#614). Integer variables handled functions (#553).

title: ospsuite 9.0
text: Version compatible OSPSuite V9. Initial Release
